function.name: nuro_sandbox_spawn
function.description: Spawn an isolated Anvil mainnet-fork sandbox (default 1-hour TTL) for safe agent testing. Returns a per-session RPC endpoint + scratch DB schema + pre-funded test wallet (USDC + ETH). Lets you exercise your agent's full execution path against real on-chain state — token approvals, swap routing, settlement, bridge attestations — without risking real money or contaminating production state. The agentic-finance differentiator nobody else offers. Costs 0.50 USDC per spawn (the priciest endpoint — reflects real compute: Anvil node + scratch schema + cleanup cron).

fork.description: Mainnet chain to fork. Base is the most common (matches Nuro production).

blockNumber.description: Block number to fork from. null = latest (recommended unless you need a reproducible historical state).

ttlMinutes.description: Session lifetime in minutes. Default 60, max 240. After TTL the sandbox is torn down + scratch schema dropped.

label.description: Human-readable tag for the sandbox session (shown in admin console). Useful for debugging stale sessions.

metadata.rateLimit: 20 req/hr per signing address (sandbox sessions are expensive)
metadata.notes: Companion endpoints (NOT x402-gated, free for the session lifetime once spawned): GET /sandbox/:sessionId/status, POST /sandbox/:sessionId/destroy
